codeReview.summary: Reviewed the handoff, transcript skeleton, prior accounting-core scrutiny context, and commit `7127d738202ba9f5ab90d4675a80cd1b8b2fa318`. The change cleanly centralizes sales/purchasing correction-journal metadata rewrites in an accounting-owned helper, removes dead sales-side `AccountingService` constructor seams, and realigns dependent proofs to the canonical header-only `Idempotency-Key` contract. I did not find a new correctness defect in this feature's scope; it trims consumer-side duplication without reopening the previously deferred deep-decomposition concern from earlier accounting-core scrutiny.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker-base guidance appears underspecified for successful feature completion when unrelated pre-existing dirty files remain in the worktree.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: The handoff for this run records `skillFeedback.followedProcedure=false` and recommends clarifying worker-base guidance because the feature commit was clean but unrelated pre-existing `.factory/droids/*.md` edits were intentionally left untouched.

summary: PASS: The reviewed feature removes the targeted duplicate correction seams, keeps downstream consumer proof aligned with the canonical `Idempotency-Key` header contract, and does not introduce a new code-review issue in its reviewed scope.
